name: signalk-tidal-currents
description: Tidal current predictions from OpenCPN/XTide harmonic files (HARMONIC/HARMONIC.IDX) — publishes environment.current and a station/timeline REST API

scripts.test: tsc && rm -rf dist-test && tsc test/*.test.ts --outDir dist-test --moduleResolution node --module es2022 --target es2022 --esModuleInterop --strict --skipLibCheck && cp -r test/fixtures dist-test/fixtures && node --test 'dist-test/*.test.js'

author: Marcel Verpaalen
